\begingroup\small
\begin{historicalsource}[{\textbf{Primary text} --- Title~18, \S~922(o) (OLRC via \texttt{nickvido/us-code}, tag \texttt{annual/2025})}]
\textit{Source:} \url{https://uscode.house.gov/view.xhtml?req=granuleid:USC-prelim-title18&num=0&edition=prelim}\par\medskip\textbf{(o)}

(1) Except as provided in paragraph (2), it shall be unlawful for any person to transfer or possess a machinegun.

(2) This subsection does not apply with respect to—

  (A) a transfer to or by, or possession by or under the authority of, the United States or any department or agency thereof or a State, or a department, agency, or political subdivision thereof; or

  (B) any lawful transfer or lawful possession of a machinegun that was lawfully possessed before the date this subsection takes effect.
\end{historicalsource}
\endgroup
